steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between the two plants. The notes give exactly one difference: Pipturus albidus is native to Oahu, while Psidium cattleyanum is non-native. A correct answer must name both plants and explicitly contrast their origins.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Most plant species found in Oahu, Hawaii, like *Psidium cattleyanum*, are non-native.: Mentions only one plant and makes a general claim about Oahu's flora. No contrast between the two plants is established. ✗
  • Choice B — Though *Pipturus albidus* and *Psidium cattleyanum* can both be found in Oahu, Hawaii, only the former plant is native.: Names both plants and directly states the one key difference — one is native, the other is not. ✓
  • Choice C — A 2019 study catalogued plant seeds found in bird fecal samples in Oahu, Hawaii, to determine what role non-native birds play in seed dispersal.: Describes the study method but says nothing about either plant individually. No difference emphasized. ✗
  • Choice D — Seeds from *Pipturus albidus* and *Psidium cattleyanum* plants were found in the fecal samples of non-native Hawaiian birds, according to a 2019 study.: Mentions both plants but highlights something they share (both had seeds dispersed by non-native birds) — a similarity, not a difference. ✗
B is correct.
